title: Custom Fishing Reloaded
description: Make Custom Fish/Item Rewards, Highly Customizable!
body:
# Custom Fishing Reloaded

Welcome to Custom Fishing Reloaded. Custom Fishing Reloaded is a maintained fork of the Custom Fishing plugin, and adds support for newer versions and more features and commands.

Original Plugin: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/⭐-custom-fishing-⭐-️-1-8-1-19-customisible-fishing-rewards-️.53634

Features
Custom Fishing Reloaded provides users with a highly customizable way of adding more fish and items to the fishing loot pool! Make your fishing experience more engaging with this plugin!

Add special effects, run commands, have custom items, and more!

Setup & Configuration:
https://github.com/SpeedSlicer/CustomFishingReloaded/wiki

Spigot Mirror: [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/custom-fishing-reloaded.124274/)

Get Support in Our Discord Server!
https://discord.gg/tWFvtYCKb7
